items.name_en: New Gucci 👉 Dionysus series, inspired by Dionysus, one of the Greek gods. The double tiger head lock carries the romantic symbol of guarding love and vows, reflecting a unique creative vision. It hits the heart at first glance.

items.name_en: Dionysus Mini Handbag. This Dionysus beige GG Supreme canvas bag is presented in a mini size, defined by the tiger head clasp, a symbol deeply loved by the House. Oatmeal leather decoration adds depth to the design, introducing tonal elements and contrasting textures.

Dionysus Mini Handbag. This Dionysus beige GG Supreme canvas bag is presented in a mini size, defined by the tiger head clasp, a symbol deeply loved by the House. Oatmeal leather decoration adds depth to the design, introducing tonal elements and contrasting textures.
Model: 752029.
Dimensions: 18*11.5*7.
Color: Khaki / PVC.

items.name_en: GG Dionysus 2020ss New Dionysus The new Dionysus tiger head logo is diamond-encrusted, and the whole design has been simplified from complex to simple, retaining the classic medium size elegant and dainty bag shape, but the weight has become much lighter! No longer the complaint of being "as heavy as a stone". Ah~ this new Dionysus is really so perfect for me! Size: 25×13.5×7cm #499623m.

items.name_en: M82926 Silver
items.name_cn:
M82926 Silver
Like the "Metis" leather goods series, this compact wallet is made of soft Monogram Unplant leather. The flap features a small silver S-lock style buckle inspired by Louis Vuitton's traditional trunks, a key detail. Despite its compact size, it offers practicality with a zippered coin pocket, 2 flat pockets, and 6 card slots.
11.5 x 8.5 x 4 cm

items.name_cn:
M83645
Crafted from soft Monogram Unplant leather and accented with silver hardware, the "Porto Cult Romy" features three card slots, a "V"-shaped flat pocket, and a coin pocket with a zipper. It is a stylish and practical accessory. The LV circle pull adds a refined touch.
Dimensions 12 8 0.8.

items.name_en: M83585 Silver Buckle
items.name_cn:
M83585 Silver Buckle
A "Porto Cult LV Charm" made of soft Monogram Unplant leather featuring embossed Monogram patterns. It has 2 card slots on each side and 1 large slot in the middle, for a total of 5 slots, making it a practical item for daily use. Decorated with 2 Monogram Flower charms, adding a feminine touch.
10.2 x 7.3 x 0.3 cm

items.name_en: M83271 Silver Clasp
items.name_cn:
M83271 Silver Clasp
A 'Portefeuille Victorine' reinterpreted with soft Monogram Unplant leather. The iconic Monogram pattern is subtly embossed. The envelope-style flap opens and closes with a 'Louis Vuitton' signature clasp. The interior features a bill and coin pocket, as well as 6 card slots.
12 x 9.5 x 1.5 cm

items.name_cn:
M11969
The 'Zippy Wallet' is updated this season with Monogram Unplant leather featuring embossed Monogram patterns. The elegant silver metal hardware contrasts with the supple grained leather, making this versatile wallet very attractive. The capacity revealed upon opening the zipper, along with the easy-to-organize interior, is also appealing. It features a bill compartment, a zippered coin pocket, and 12 card slots, offering excellent practicality.
Size: 19.5 10.5 2.5.
